      static int MEDIA_MUTE
      Set the media volume to mute, get the media mute status, media mute status callback 设置媒体音量静音，获取媒体静音状态，媒体静音状态回调 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type true means mute, otherwise false deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-09-02 19:54:41
      static int NAVIGATION_MUTE
      Set the navigation volume to mute, get the navigation mute status, and the navigation mute status callback 设置导航音量静音，获取导航静音状态，导航静音状态回调 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type true means mute, otherwise false deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-09-02 19:53:03

      UI setting, users can choose different sound types for soft button press, when users choose one of them, audio system shall play it one time 软按键(触屏)音效类型设置 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IAudio.SoftButtonSoundType property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 20:47:55

      • MEDIA_MUTE

        static final int MEDIA_MUTE
        Set the media volume to mute, get the media mute status, media mute status callback 设置媒体音量静音，获取媒体静音状态，媒体静音状态回调
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Boolean property type true means mute, otherwise false
        deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-09-02 19:54:41
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • CURRENT_ACTIVE_USAGE

        static final int CURRENT_ACTIVE_USAGE
        Returns the current playing audio source, which has the highest priority for adjusting the volume. The priority strategy is determined according to project requirements. The default is media. For example, when media and navigation are mixed, the navigation should be returned. 返回当前播放音源中，针对调节音量而言优先级最高usage,优先级策略是按照项目需求决定，默认调节的是媒体。 比如当媒体和导航混音时应该返回的是导航。
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Integer property type see android.media.AudioAttributes.AttributeUsage. For extended audio usage, please refer to IAudioAttributes
        deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-12-16 17:17:22
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values
